---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in DOMANGCHA
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: docore
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Execute command `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected output.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or terminal output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Shell: (e.g., zsh 5.9, bash 5.2)
- Claude Code version: (run `claude --version`)
- DOMANGCHA version: (contents of `domangcha/VERSION`)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g., which agent triggered the issue, which command was used).
